## Gate-3 Demo PR (Required)

### Required Links (must be non-empty)
- Evidence dashboard URL: `https://brunogaosz.github.io/ljwx-deploy/`
- Prior gate PR URL (Gate-2):
- Demo script URL:
- Demo artifact URL (video/screenshot/log):

### Strict Checklist (all required)
- [ ] Demo path covers critical user flow.
- [ ] Expected and observed results are documented.
- [ ] Repro instructions are included.
- [ ] Known gaps are listed with owner/date.
- [ ] Demo evidence link is attached.

### Blocking Rule
PR must not merge until every checkbox is checked and required links are filled.
